title: Seismic Content Item
description: A content item in the Seismic platform representing a document, presentation, or other sales enablement material.

id.description: Unique identifier of the content item.

folderId.description: ID of the folder containing this content item.

contentProfileId.description: ID of the associated content profile.

fileType.description: File type extension of the content item.

mimeType.description: MIME type of the content file.

versionNumber.description: Current version number of the content item.

status.description: Publication status of the content item.

tags.description: Tags associated with the content item.

properties.description: Custom content property values as key-value pairs.

createdBy.description: ID of the user who created the content item.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the content item was created.

modifiedBy.description: ID of the user who last modified the content item.

modifiedAt.description: Timestamp when the content item was last modified.

thumbnailUrl.description: URL for the content item thumbnail image.
